landing.mainHeadline:
Your fleeting tendencies,
SCAN will analyze them for you.

intro.subtitle:
Reading myself more finely, more like myself
High-resolution personality analysis
intro.answer1:
SCAN is a test that tries to answer this question without rushing,
but accurately.
intro.question2:
"Am I sensitive?"
"Why do I find it particularly difficult in these situations?"
intro.answer2:
It's okay not to blame yourself first.
The problem is not you,
but perhaps the way your tendencies are being used.
intro.section2Title: 5 Personality Axes That Create Your Coordinates
intro.warningTitle: Before we start, please promise one thing
intro.warningText:
Intuitive answers are the most accurate data.
Don't think too deeply.
Choose the side your first feeling goes to.
Your honesty, without overthinking each question for more than 10 seconds,
creates the most accurate results.
intro.footerText: Now, shall we understand ourselves a little more clearly?

survey.title: SCAN Personality Test
survey.instruction:
Intuitive answers may be the most accurate data.
Don't think too deeply, check with your first feeling!
survey.hint: Please answer all questions in this group
